---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for ShareTab
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What problem does this solve? Who is affected and how often?

## Proposed Solution

Describe what you'd like to see. Be as specific as you can.

## Alternatives Considered

Any other approaches you thought about and why you ruled them out.

## Additional Context

Screenshots, mockups, links to similar features in other apps, etc.
